entries.title: Connect Claude and coding agents with OAuth — no tokens
entries.description: Tiddly's MCP servers now support OAuth sign-in: paste a server URL into Claude (web, desktop, or mobile), Claude Code, or Codex, sign in with your Tiddly account in the browser, and approve — done. Claude connectors sync across all your devices automatically. Token-based setup via the CLI keeps working unchanged and remains the path for headless tools. Per-app steps: https://tiddly.me/docs/ai.

entries.title: Share bookmarks, notes, and prompts with a public link
entries.description: Publish any item to a stable, read-only public URL that anyone can open — no account needed. Use the Share control on the item's detail page to create the link, copy it, stop sharing, or regenerate it (which invalidates the old link). Sharing never changes the item's "last updated" time, and your tags and relationships stay private — the public view shows only the content and its dates.

entries.title: Save a copy of a shared item
entries.description: Signed in and viewing someone's shared link? Save your own independent copy to your account with one click — it lands in your library as a fresh, unshared item. Sign up straight from a shared link and your copy is waiting once you're in.

entries.title: Antigravity MCP support
entries.description: Connect Google Antigravity — the agy CLI and the Antigravity IDE — to your bookmarks, notes, and prompts. Run `tiddly mcp configure antigravity` (it configures both, since they share one config). Antigravity is Google's successor to Gemini CLI for individual-tier users.

entries.title: Tips & Tricks docs page
entries.description: Browse a curated catalog of usage tips at /docs/tips, filterable by topic and audience. Search by keyword to find the trick you're thinking of.

entries.title: Command palette searches tips, docs, and settings
entries.description: Press Cmd+Shift+P and start typing. Beyond commands and content, the palette now finds tips, docs pages, and settings — by concept, not just literal name (e.g. "mcp" finds AI Integration settings).

entries.title: Default keyboard shortcut for the Chrome extension
entries.description: Open the Chrome extension with Option+Shift+S (Mac) or Alt+Shift+S (Windows/Linux). Rebind anytime at chrome://extensions/shortcuts.

entries.title: Keyboard shortcuts display correctly on Windows and Linux
entries.description: Shortcuts now render with platform-native modifiers — Ctrl, Alt, and Shift on Windows/Linux instead of the Mac ⌘/⌥/⇧ glyphs — everywhere they appear: the shortcuts dialog, docs, toolbar tooltips, command palette, and settings.

entries.title: Better empty states on saved filter views
entries.description: When a saved filter has no matches, the empty state now describes what the filter is actually looking for — content types, tags, plus any transient search or chips layered on top — instead of a generic "no items match."

entries.title: AI tag suggestions
entries.description: Open the tag input to get AI-suggested tags based on your content. Click to add.

entries.title: AI metadata suggestions
entries.description: Sparkle icons on title and description fields generate suggestions from your content.

entries.title: AI relationship suggestions
entries.description: Open the link input to get suggestions for related bookmarks, notes, and prompts.

entries.title: AI prompt argument suggestions
entries.description: Generate prompt arguments from template placeholders, or suggest names and descriptions for individual arguments.

entries.title: Collapsible sidebar settings
entries.description: Settings section in the sidebar is now collapsible with persisted state.

entries.title: Docs link in sidebar
entries.description: Quick access to documentation from the sidebar settings section.

entries.title: Tiddly CLI
entries.description: Command-line tool for configuring MCP servers and syncing agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI tools.

entries.title: Public docs site
entries.description: Sidebar navigation, AI integration guides, content types, search, versioning, and keyboard shortcuts.

entries.title: Features page
entries.description: Animated demos showcasing core capabilities.

entries.title: Pricing page
entries.description: Free and Pro tier comparison with full feature breakdown.

entries.title: PAT rename
entries.description: Rename Personal Access Tokens from the settings page.

entries.title: Keyboard navigation for content list
entries.description: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to open.

entries.title: Page load performance
entries.description: Route-level code splitting, CORS preflight caching, and proper static asset cache headers. Faster cold loads and repeat navigations skip network round-trips entirely.

entries.title: Smarter data fetching
entries.description: Filter views no longer fire a redundant API call before filters load. User limits are prefetched at the layout level so detail pages render without a sequential waterfall.

entries.title: Landing page animations
entries.description: Scroll-triggered animations for a smoother first impression.

entries.title: Chrome extension
entries.description: Tag filtering, sort options, character limit feedback, draft persistence, and search results open in the current tab.

entries.title: Editor state preservation
entries.description: Undo history, cursor position, and unsaved edits survive save cycles.

entries.title: Character limit feedback
entries.description: Progressive color-coded warnings replace hard validation errors across all form fields.

entries.title: Search bar
entries.description: Press f to focus; placeholder shows the shortcut hint.

entries.title: Chrome extension
entries.description: Save and search bookmarks from any page.

entries.title: Content versioning
entries.description: Full history with diffs and one-click restore.

entries.title: Full-text search with command palette
entries.description: Press Cmd+Shift+P to search across all content.

entries.title: Content relationships
entries.description: Link related bookmarks, notes, and prompts together.

entries.title: Table of contents sidebar
entries.description: Auto-generated heading navigation for long documents.

entries.title: Slash command menu & editor command palette
entries.description: Type / for block commands or Cmd+/ for editor actions.

entries.title: Jinja2 syntax highlighting
entries.description: Template variables and blocks are highlighted in the editor.

entries.title: MCP eval framework
entries.description: Better testing and validation for MCP tool integrations.

entries.title: Multi-value view search
entries.description: Search across multiple fields with archive relevance.

entries.title: UI density and consistency
entries.description: Tighter spacing and unified component styles throughout the app.

entries.title: Tier-based usage limits
entries.description: Free and Pro tiers with clear content and API limits.

entries.title: Agent Skills export
entries.description: Export prompts for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and Codex.

entries.title: WYSIWYG markdown editor
entries.description: Rich editing with syntax highlighting and keyboard shortcuts.

entries.title: Prompt template preview
entries.description: Render Jinja2 templates with sample data before saving.

entries.title: Filters & Collections
entries.description: Saved tag-based boolean filters for organizing content.

entries.title: MCP context endpoints and update tools
entries.description: Richer context and more capable editing via MCP.

entries.title: HTTP caching
entries.description: ETag and Last-Modified support for faster responses.

entries.title: Multi-tab change detection
entries.description: Optimistic locking prevents overwriting edits from other tabs.

entries.title: Content editing API and MCP tools
entries.description: Programmatic content updates via API and MCP.

entries.title: UUIDv7 primary keys
entries.description: Time-sortable IDs for better database performance.

entries.title: Bookmarks
entries.description: Save URLs with auto-scraped metadata, personal notes, and tags.

entries.title: Notes
entries.description: Freeform markdown documents with tags.

entries.title: Prompt templates
entries.description: Jinja2 templates with named arguments for AI workflows.

entries.title: Tags & organization
entries.description: Global tagging system across all content types.

entries.title: MCP integration
entries.description: Two MCP servers for AI assistant access to all content.

entries.title: API & Personal Access Tokens
entries.description: Programmatic access via REST API with PAT authentication.
